data.name: Errors.DeviceControl.RequestFailed
data.value: The device control request could not be completed.

data.name: Errors.Iam.RequestFailed
data.value: The identity and access request could not be completed.

data.name: Errors.Monitoring.RequestFailed
data.value: The monitoring request could not be completed.

data.name: Errors.NotFound.Title
data.value: The requested resource was not found.

data.name: Errors.Notification.RequestFailed
data.value: The notification request could not be completed.

data.name: Errors.Workplace.RequestFailed
data.value: The workplace request could not be completed.

data.name: TokenSecretNotConfigured
data.value: The JWT signing key is not configured.

data.name: UserEmailDuplicated
data.value: A user with that email is already registered.

data.name: UserPasswordTooShort
data.value: The password must have at least 8 characters.
